// PROFESSIONAL PROFILE

About Me

Enterprise Network & Security Engineer with 2+ years of production experience designing, deploying, and operating large-scale enterprise networks across multi-site infrastructure environments in Saudi Arabia.

Core expertise spans FortiGate firewall operations and SD-WAN, enterprise routing & switching (OSPF, BGP, EIGRP), VLAN-based segmentation, 802.1X/RADIUS network access control, multi-ISP WAN management, and large-scale wireless infrastructure deployment.

Consistently delivers network environments exceeding 99.9% uptime across complex, high-churn deployments supporting 1,200+ endpoints. Proven ability to act as primary technical escalation authority — performing root-cause analysis, vendor coordination, and permanent resolution of network incidents.

SPECIALIZATIONNetwork & Security Engineering
LOCATIONBased in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
CERTIFICATIONCCNA | CNSP | Fortinet
IN PROGRESSCCNP ENCOR
FOCUS AREAFortiGate · SD-WAN · Security
EXPERIENCE2+ Years Enterprise Networks
⚡ PROFESSIONAL VISION

Advancing toward Network Security Engineering — integrating deep infrastructure knowledge with enterprise security architecture including zero-trust design, threat detection, advanced firewall policy management, and penetration testing.


Expanding expertise in CCNP ENCOR, OT/ICS network security, SIEM platforms, and cloud-managed network security frameworks — targeting senior-level enterprise security roles across Vision 2030 infrastructure and beyond.

FortiGate — Fortinet
Next-Generation Firewall & SD-WAN Platform
CONFIGURATIONS WORKED ON
  • Firewall policy creation, ordering, and hardening across multiple VDOMs
  • Inter-VLAN routing via FortiGate as Layer 3 gateway
  • Static NAT and Dynamic PAT for internet access and server publishing
  • Policy NAT and NAT exemption for VPN traffic
  • IPsec Site-to-Site VPN — IKEv1 & IKEv2, Phase 1 & Phase 2 configuration
  • Dial-up IPsec VPN for remote branch connectivity
  • SSL VPN (FortiClient) — user/group-based access policies
  • SD-WAN configuration: SLA probes, load balancing, failover rules
  • Multi-ISP WAN management with health monitoring and controlled failover
  • Web filtering profiles — category-based and URL-based filtering
  • Application control — identifying and blocking non-business traffic
  • IPS sensor deployment and signature management
  • DHCP server and DHCP relay configuration per VLAN
  • FortiGate log analysis via FortiView and syslog forwarding
  • HA (Active-Passive) configuration fundamentals
SKILLS & EXPERTISE
  • Production deployment — 6-ISP DIA with SD-WAN SLA steering
  • Enterprise firewall policy design aligned to security requirements
  • Route-based and policy-based VPN design and troubleshooting
  • NAT-T configuration for VPN traversal across ISP-NATted environments
  • Segmented VLAN security architecture managed via FortiGate
  • Threat prevention tuning — IPS, AV, botnet C&C filtering
  • FortiGate CLI proficiency for advanced troubleshooting
  • VPN log analysis and phase negotiation troubleshooting
  • Security policy audit and cleanup across large rule sets
  • Integration with RADIUS for user-authenticated SSL VPN
